clustered_themes: Legal route validity is necessary but insufficient without evidence continuity.
Most avoidable risk arises at handoffs between legal, HR, manager communication, and payroll coding.
Settlement language and payment execution must remain tightly synchronized.
Local implementation variance remains material for foreign operators.
source_fit_review.deduplication_note: Shifted from prior signal-stack board to a priority-ladder briefing format focused on intervention order and escalation discipline.
key_uncertainties: Arbitration emphasis can differ by city and panel.
Tax handling of settlement components depends on structure and local practice.
Case-fact changes close to execution can alter route viability.
